old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-w8rd.1","title":"Remove unsupported T-Beam Supreme commands","description":"Until a canonical T-Beam Supreme Zephyr board is added, remove active west build commands and documentation that present tbeam_supreme as a valid target. new_value: Removed tbeam_supreme from active west build commands in lichen/README.md, updated toolchain note, added BLOCKED status to overlay/conf/docs/matrix/spec. No commands now present tbeam_supreme as valid. Future support remains tracked in parent. Verified with bd show and grep.
